message:
✨ Add missing cards to dashboard templates (#306)

Ensure every registered card appears in at least one template:
- event_summary, warning_events, recent_events → new Events Dashboard template
- rss_feed → Utilities template
- pod_crosser → Arcade Action + Full Arcade templates
- workload_monitor → Application Monitoring template
- cluster_health_monitor → Cluster Overview template
- llmd_stack_monitor → llm-d Inference template
- prow_ci_monitor → Prow CI Dashboard template
- github_ci_monitor → Utilities template

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
